meaning: n.<意> 二重唱,艺人的一对
examples: The duo were a real hit in last year's show.
You can order a melon duo, tofu salad and grilled royal trumpet mushrooms with polenta.
Although Fujio is most well-known for creating the duo of cat-from-the-future Doraemon and Nobita, the museum also showcases his other works.
But Mark Easter's try was followed by a double sin-binning for Saints duo Phil Dowson and Calum Clark.
McCluskey and Topley came on for Dungannon at half-time and the duo's introduction gave impetus to the Swifts.
